declarations.name: ToggleBanner
declarations.default: { play: async ({ canvasElement }) => { const canvas = within(canvasElement); const button = canvas.getByShadowRole("button"); const dotGovText = canvas.getByShadowText("Official websites use .gov"); userEvent.click(button); await waitFor(() => { expect(dotGovText).toBeVisible(); }); userEvent.click(button); await waitFor(() => { expect(dotGovText).not.toBeVisible(); }); }, }
